response.justification: Strong hands-on senior engineer with broad polyglot experience, open-source contributions, Linux familiarity, and a founder track record running GISCollective. However, the role is an executive-level Head of Development position requiring formal team leadership experience and German at C1 minimum, both of which are gaps: the resume shows individual-contributor titles (Senior/Staff Software Engineer) with mentoring/workshops rather than direct team leadership, and German is listed as Basic versus the required C1.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Strong open-source and Linux/Unix background, including founding and running GISCollective
Demonstrated mentoring, workshop creation, and community teaching (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals)
concerns: German listed as Basic; role requires C1 minimum
No explicit Head of Development or formal people-management/P&L experience
Python and UML proficiency are not evidenced on the resume

key_factors.factor: Deep polyglot engineering and open-source/Linux background
